title: Khomas NAMPOL FC

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Namibian football club

Football club

Khomas NAMPOL FC

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Ground | UNAM Stadium |
| Capacity | 3,000 |
| Manager | Fortune Eichab |
| League | [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership") |
| [2023–24](/wiki/2023%E2%80%9324_Namibia_Premiership "2023–24 Namibia Premiership") | 3rd |

**Khomas NAMPOL FC** is a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club based in [Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek") which currently plays in the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership"). The club is affiliated with the [Namibian Police Force](/wiki/Namibian_Police_Force "Namibian Police Force") (NAMPOL).[[1]](#cite_note-Lose_Ground-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Khomas_NAMPOL_FC&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Khomas NAMPOL FC was founded in 2014. The club won the [First Division](/wiki/Namibia_First_Division "Namibia First Division") Southern Stream in 2023 to earn promotion to the [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership") for the first time.[[2]](#cite_note-Khomas_Nampol_win_SSFD-2) Ahead of their first top-flight campaign, the club won a pre-season tournament which featured four other Premiership clubs and [Matebele FC](/wiki/Matebele_FC "Matebele FC") of the [Botswana Premier League](/wiki/Botswana_Premier_League "Botswana Premier League").[[3]](#cite_note-Preseason_Tournament-3)

Khomas NAMPOL began their first season in the top flight with five wins in its first five matches to top the league table at that point. The roster included [Namibia internationals](/wiki/Namibia_national_football_team "Namibia national football team") such as [Terdius Uiseb](/wiki/Terdius_Uiseb "Terdius Uiseb") and [Absalom Iimbondi](/wiki/Absalom_Iimbondi "Absalom Iimbondi").[[4]](#cite_note-great_start_continues-4) The club continued its strong performances and remained in the title race throughout the season.[[5]](#cite_note-Title_Chase-5) The club ultimately won the bronze medal that season as NAMPOL players [Rewaldo Prins](/wiki/Rewaldo_Prins "Rewaldo Prins") and [George Frans](/w/index.php?title=George_Frans&action=edit&redlink=1 "George Frans (page does not exist)") finished second and third in the league scoring race, respectively.[[6]](#cite_note-Stars_Back_to_Back_Champions-6)

## Honours

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Khomas_NAMPOL_FC&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Honours")]

* [Namibia Premiership](/wiki/Namibia_Premiership "Namibia Premiership")

:   :   Bronze: [2023–24](/wiki/2023%E2%80%9324_Namibia_Premiership "2023–24 Namibia Premiership")

* [First Division](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)") Southern Stream

:   :   Winners: 2023
